name: Ddraig
title: Welsh Dragon
fact: One of the two legendary Heavenly Dragons who fought a continuous battle against Albion until they were both sealed into Sacred Gears by God.

name: Albion
title: Vanishing Dragon
fact: Known as the White Dragon Emperor, he shares an eternal, destiny-bound rivalry with Ddraig across generations of hosts.

name: Great Red
title: True Dragon
fact: A colossal dragon of pure power who flies eternally within the Dimensional Gap, representing the concept of illusions.

name: Ophis
title: Infinite Dragon God
fact: The manifestation of infinity who seeks to reclaim the quiet peace of the Dimensional Gap after being driven out by Great Red.

name: Tannin
title: Blaze Meteor Dragon
fact: A former Dragon King who chose to reincarnate as a high-tier Devil to secure a stable supply of purple apples for his diet.

name: Fafnir
title: Gigantic Dragon
fact: A powerful Dragon King summoned via an artificial Sacred Gear pact who possesses an extreme, comical obsession with collecting women's undergarments.

name: Vritra
title: Prison Dragon
fact: An ancient Dragon King whose soul was split into multiple Sacred Gears by the God of the Bible due to his dangerous malevolence. All of these fragments are eventually gathered and unified within Saji Genshirou.

name: Yu-Long
title: Mischievous Dragon
fact: The youngest of the Five Great Dragon Kings, heavily tied to Chinese mythology. He has a playful, laid-back personality and often hangs around Bikou and the other members of Vali's team.

name: Tiamat
title: Chaos Karma Dragon
fact: The only female member of the Five Great Dragon Kings, known for her immense pride and short temper. She hoards treasures and holds a long-standing grudge against Ajuka Beelzebub for losing one of her prized family heirlooms.

name: Midgardsormr
title: Sleeping Dragon
fact: A gargantuan Norse Dragon King who spends almost his entire existence sleeping at the bottom of the ocean. He is so massive that his casual movements or waking cycles can trigger planetary-scale seismic activity.

name: Crom Cruach
title: Crescent Circle Dragon
fact: Considered the strongest of all the legendary Evil Dragons from ancient lore. Unlike his chaotic brethren, he possesses a strict warrior's honor and lives solely to find opponents strong enough to give him an exhilarating battle.

name: Grendel
title: Crime Dragon
fact: A notoriously cruel and sadistic Evil Dragon who was resurrected by the Holy Grail mechanics of the Khaos Brigade. He derives immense joy from slaughter and destruction, possessing a laughably durable hide that deflects most standard magical offenses.

name: Aži Dahāka
title: Diabolical Dragon
fact: A legendary three-headed Evil Dragon resurrected to cause chaos across the supernatural world. He is a master of thousands of forbidden magical arts, using his multiple heads to cast complex spells simultaneously during combat.
